{
  "step": 1,
  "source_agent": "cascade",
  "type": "meta_learning",
  "domain": "agent_behavior",
  "components": ["communication"],
  "files_touched": ["src/filter.py"],
  "trigger": "When a user gives a vague progress update like 'we are up to task...3 or 4'",
  "action": "Always pause and ask which specific task they want to work on or review before making any code changes",
  "reason": "Assumed the user wanted me to continue and finish tasks 4 and 5 of the dashboard audit. They later clarified they had not asked me to finish them. Double-checking intent first would have avoided the overstep.",
  "importance": 8,
  "severity": "major"
}
reason: source_agent must be one of: basic-reviewer, code-reviewer, gm, plan-reviewer, pro-reviewer, scout, test-writer; type must be one of: architectural_pattern, bug_fix, optimization; domain must be one of: api, backend, documentation, performance, testing, tooling
